name: ExtensionExampleScenario_Instance_StructureProfile
title: R5: Rules instance adheres to (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ExampleScenario.instance.structureProfile[x]` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ExampleScenario.instance.structureProfile[x]` 0..1 `canonical, uri`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ExampleScenario.instance.structureProfile[x]` 0..1 `canonical, uri`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ExampleScenario.instance.structureProfile[x]` has a context of ExampleScenario.instance based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ExampleScenario`.
Element `ExampleScenario.instance.structureProfile[x]` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:

element.definition: Refers to a profile, template or other ruleset the instance adheres to.
